channel.title: Anthropic News (unofficial)
channel.description: Announcements from anthropic.com/news, built hourly from the sitemap.

item.title: Government of Alberta uses Claude to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities
item.description: The Government of Alberta has been using Claude Code with both Opus and Sonnet models to review its systems, find vulnerabilities, and fix them.

item.title: Claude's extended thinking
item.description: Discussing Claude's new thought process

item.title: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Redeploying Claude Fable 5
item.description: Anthropic is redeploying Claude Fable 5 starting July 1 following the lifting of export controls, with updated cybersecurity safeguards and a new industry jailbreak framework.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
item.description: Today we’re launching Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.

item.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists
item.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

item.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

item.title: Anthropic's core views on AI safety
item.description: AI progress may lead to transformative AI systems in the next decade, but we do not yet understand how to make such systems safe and aligned with human values. In response, we are pursuing a variety of research directions aimed at better understanding, evaluating, and aligning AI systems.

item.title: Introducing Claude Corps
item.description: Anthropic is launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

item.title: DXC integrates Claude into systems regulated industries rely on
item.description: Anthropic is announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies.

item.title: TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: Anthropic is announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.

item.title: Anthropic partners with the Gates Foundation
item.description: Anthropic is partnering with the Gates Foundation to commit $200 million in grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technical support for programs in global health, life sciences, education, and economic mobility over the next four years.

item.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office
item.description: Anthropic opens in Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem.

item.title: Introducing Claude Tag
item.description: Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.

item.title: Developing nuclear safeguards for AI through public-private partnership
item.description: Together with the NNSA and DOE national laboratories, we have co-developed a classifier—an AI system that automatically categorizes content—that distinguishes between concerning and benign nuclear-related conversations with 96% accuracy in preliminary testing.

item.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

item.title: Results from first Anthropic Public Record
item.description: Anthropic Public Record is a national survey of attitudes and opinions towards AI.

item.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
item.description: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI.

item.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
item.description: Over the past several months, we’ve been organizing dialogues with groups whose work and traditions bear on the questions raised by AI.

item.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
item.description: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

item.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
item.description: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.

item.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
item.description: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

item.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
item.description: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission

item.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
item.description: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

item.title: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
item.description: We're opening a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe.

item.title: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea
item.description: KiYoung Choi is joining Anthropic as Representative Director of Korea, ahead of the opening of our Seoul office.

item.title: Anthropic acquires Stainless
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Introducing Claude for Small Business
item.description: We're launching Claude for Small Business, a package of connectors and ready-to-run workflows that put Claude inside the tools small businesses use every day.

item.title: Agents for financial services
item.description: We're releasing ten new Cowork and Claude Code plugins, integrations with the Microsoft 365 suite, new connectors, and an MCP app for financial services and insurance organizations.

item.title: Introducing the Model Context Protocol
item.description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard for connecting AI assistants to the systems where data lives, including content repositories, business tools, and development environments. Its aim is to help frontier models produce better, more relevant responses.

item.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
item.description: We’ve raised Claude's usage limits and agreed a new compute partnership with SpaceX that will substantially increase our capacity in the near term.

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks.

item.title: Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Claude for Creative Work
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: The Long-Term Benefit Trust
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: An update on our election safeguards
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Anthropic Sydney office
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Anthropic and NEC partner to build AI-native engineering at scale in Japan
item.description: NEC will deploy Claude to 30,000 employees and become Anthropic's first Japan-based global partner, co-developing AI products for finance, manufacturing, and government

item.title: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appoints Vas Narasimhan to Board of Directors
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Claude for Financial Services
item.description: Today, we're introducing a comprehensive solution for financial analysis that transforms how finance professionals analyze markets, conduct research, and make investment decisions with Claude.

item.title: Advancing Claude in healthcare and the life sciences
item.description: Introducing Claude for Healthcare with HIPAA-ready infrastructure, plus expanded Life Sciences tools for clinical trials and regulatory submissions. New connectors to CMS, Medidata, and ClinicalTrials.gov.

item.title: Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
